sourcesContent:
import "./RecipeDetails.css"; import { useParams, Link } from "react-router-dom"; export default function RecipeDetails() { const { id } = useParams(); // Temporary static data (replace with Django API later) const recipe = { id, title: "Spaghetti Carbonara", author: "Sarah Lee", views: 1200, time: "30 mins", difficulty: "Medium", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504674900247-0877df9cc836", ingredients: [ "Spaghetti", "Eggs", "Parmesan Cheese", "Bacon", "Black Pepper", "Salt", ], steps: [ "Boil spaghetti in salted water until al dente.", "Cook bacon until crispy.", "Whisk eggs and parmesan together.", "Mix hot pasta with bacon and egg mixture.", "Season with pepper and serve immediately.", ], }; return (
← Back to Recipes

{recipe.title}

👤 {recipe.author}

👁 {recipe.views} views

⏱ {recipe.time}

🔥 Difficulty: {recipe.difficulty}

Ingredients

    {recipe.ingredients.map((item, index) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

Cooking Steps

    {recipe.steps.map((step, index) => (
  1. {step}
    2. ))}
); }
